Operation 'getCustomMemeImage' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary 'Display a custom meme' is vague and doesn't clarify that this operation generates a meme. Description is completely empty, providing no guidance on inputs, outputs, or operation behavior. Improved summary uses action-oriented language ('Generate and retrieve'). Enhanced description explains: (1) the operation's purpose (combining template with text), (2) input parameters and their format, (3) what is returned (meme image), (4) clarification that this is on-demand generation without persistence. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Generate and retrieve custom meme image
data.description_suggestion: Generates a meme image by combining a specified template with custom text overlays. Accepts a template ID and encoded text filepath containing the text to overlay on the meme. Returns the generated meme image. The text_filepath parameter should contain the meme text encoded in the format expected by the API (typically URL-encoded text lines separated by delimiters). This operation creates a new meme image on-demand without persisting it.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Display a custom meme' is vague and doesn't clarify that this operation generates a meme. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.
